brand.name: RukhUA Forum
brand.fullName: Public Movement for the Development of Ukraine

home.title: Public Movement for the Development of Ukraine
home.description: Official public platform for civic initiatives, dialogue, transparency and national development.

news.title: News and Announcements
news.description: Official news, articles and public announcements from the organization.

hero.title: Public Movement for the Development of Ukraine
hero.subtitle: We bring citizens, experts and communities together to develop public initiatives, transparent institutions and sustainable national progress.

about.title: About the Organization
about.body: The organization exists as a trusted public forum for cooperation, civic participation and practical proposals that strengthen Ukraine's democratic development.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Our mission is to unite active citizens, professionals and communities around public initiatives that help Ukraine develop responsibly, openly and sustainably.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: We work toward a democratic society with transparent institutions, strong communities and development decisions shaped through open dialogue.

items.title: Responsibility
items.description: Public work must be accountable to people and communities.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Decisions, processes and results should be understandable and open.

items.title: Cooperation
items.description: Durable change is built by citizens, experts, institutions and partners together.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: Modern tools and ideas should serve practical civic outcomes.

items.title: Patriotism
items.description: Commitment to Ukraine is expressed through useful public action.

items.title: Professionalism
items.description: Every initiative needs competence, discipline and respect for facts.

items.title: Spiritual Development
items.description: Support for dignity, unity and shared moral responsibility.

items.title: Politics
items.description: Public dialogue on governance and accountable institutions.

items.title: Economy
items.description: Ideas for investment, entrepreneurship and resilient growth.

items.title: Education
items.description: Initiatives that strengthen learning and civic competence.

items.title: Culture
items.description: Projects that protect heritage and encourage creative exchange.

items.title: Sports
items.description: Community wellbeing through active and inclusive participation.

items.title: Medicine
items.description: Public health priorities and practical cooperation with experts.

items.title: Ecology
items.description: Environmental responsibility and sustainable local development.

items.title: Law
items.description: Legal awareness, rights protection and public oversight.

structure.title: Organizational Structure
structure.intro: The public organization is presented as a clear institutional structure rather than a paper diagram.

steps.title: Public Organization
steps.description: The legal and civic foundation of the movement.

steps.title: Public Council
steps.description: A consultative body for public priorities and strategic dialogue.

steps.title: Head Office
steps.description: Coordination, administration and support for national activity.

steps.title: Departments
steps.description: Specialized teams responsible for programs and proposals.

departments.title: Reform Department
departments.description: Program placeholder for reform proposals and implementation analysis.

departments.title: Innovation & Investment Department
departments.description: Program placeholder for innovation, investment and development initiatives.

departments.title: International Relations Department
departments.description: Program placeholder for international cooperation and diaspora links.

departments.title: Management Department
departments.description: Program placeholder for operational coordination and governance.

departments.title: Business Proposals Department
departments.description: Program placeholder for economic proposals and partner engagement.

platform.title: Public Platform
platform.body: The organization serves as a platform where citizens can share proposals, launch civic initiatives, cooperate with experts and discuss community needs.

control.title: Public Control
control.body: We support public oversight, open information and transparent institutions as essential conditions for trust.

roundTables.title: Online Round Tables
roundTables.body: Regular online discussions help gather public opinion, involve experts, discuss important topics and shape practical proposals.

join.title: Join the Organization
join.body: Citizens, experts, community representatives and partners can participate through proposals, working groups and public discussions.

newsPage.description: Articles, public announcements and updates from the organization.
